title: On the Duties of the Clergy
description: The first systematic Christian ethics, modeled on Cicero: how the virtues of prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance apply to clergy.
introduction: The first systematic Christian ethics, modeled on Cicero: how the virtues of prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance apply to clergy.

translation.text: Nothing is more excellent than mercy and generosity. The very beauty of virtue lies in the benefit it brings to others.
